metadata.notes: RE-ASSESSED after #719+#766+golden-summary surfacing: store-derived context vector reaches the replay golden and of verify → daemon=full (cost still deferred to #716).

assessment.body:
## Verdict (RE-ASSESSMENT — supersedes the stale daemon=incapable / applicable:false verdict, which predated #719 and #766)

**agent=yes.** `agy` displays both metrics in its own TUI: the footer shows the model chip ('Gemini 3.x Flash/Pro', observed live) and `/context` visualizes context usage. Unchanged from the prior assessment.

**daemon=full** (was `incapable`). The earlier verdict reasoned that tokens/cost/context live in the per-conversation SQLite store the adapter "deliberately does not read" — that is no longer true. Two merged changes flip it:

- **#719 (`parser.go:180` `applyDBMetrics`).** On every `turn_done` the parser reads the sibling conversation store `<root>/conversations/<conv>.db` and sets BOTH `ev.ModelName` (the canonical resolvable id from gen_metadata field #19, normalized via `NormalizeModelName`) AND `ev.Tokens.Total = contextTokens` (the in-context prompt-token count from gen_metadata field #5; see `dbmetrics.go:121-144` for the field map). With a non-zero Total flowing, `ComputeContextUtilization` returns > 0 and `context_window` > 0 from the capacity table for the resolved model.

**Recording requires ≥2 turns (verified against the failed single-turn recording).** Decoding the captured store of the failed single-turn 1.8 recording shows `gen_metadata` holds only an idx=0 row with `contextTokens=0` — agy records ZERO in-context tokens after the FIRST turn; context only accrues from the second turn on (5.1's 3-turn recording got total_tokens=16316). So the recipe runs TWO turns and the context metrics are asserted after the 2nd `turn_done`. (model_name is non-unknown from turn 1; the two context metrics need turn 2.)
- **#766 (merged a31bc2e2).** The recording rig captures the store (`curate-lifecycle-fixture.sh` copies `store/conversations/<conv>.db`+wal/+shm) and the replay engine serves it: `Parser.StageReplayStore` (`replaystore.go:25`) rebuilds the live `brain/<conv>/.system_generated/logs/` layout under the replay tmpdir and copies the captured store to `tmpDir/conversations/<conv>.db`, so the unchanged `storePathForTranscript` resolves it (`engine.go` `newReplayer` relocates the transcript to that nested path). A synthetic-store replay test already proves `context_window` + `context_utilization` resolve at replay.

- **Golden-summary surfacing (the final hop to verify-checkable).** The store-derived vector only reaches `of verify` because `finalizeSummary` (`cmd/replay/metrics.go:52-59`, antigravity-gated on `lastMetrics.TotalTokens > 0`) lifts `TotalTokens`/`ContextWindow`/`ContextUtilization` from the last SessionMetrics into the replay golden summary's `total_tokens`/`context_window`/`context_utilization_percentage` fields (`cmd/replay/types.go:147-148`), kept `omitempty` so every cum-token adapter's golden stays byte-identical. `of verify` then exposes three matching observation assertions — `context_window_nonzero`, `context_utilization_nonzero`, `total_tokens_nonzero` (`internal/validate/expected.go:94-96`) — that read those store-derived summary fields. This cell asserts the first two.

**CRITICAL — do NOT use `tokens_nonzero`.** The legacy `tokens_nonzero` assertion reads `totalTokens() = cum_input_tokens + cum_output_tokens` (`internal/validate/observations.go:37`), which antigravity NEVER feeds (it has no in-transcript per-turn cum usage) — asserting it would hard-fail verify on every recording. The store-occupancy total flows through the SEPARATE `total_tokens` summary field, reachable only via `total_tokens_nonzero`; this cell instead asserts the two derived context metrics the scenario actually requires.

**Why full, not bug:** the trace is now read and handled correctly end-to-end (live + replay + golden surfacing + verify); nothing is mis-handled.

**driver=ready** (was `gap:wait_turn`). The stale gap was wrong: `replaydata/agents/antigravity/driver-interactive.sh` lists `wait_turn` in `DRIVE_ELICITS` (line 113) and implements it (line 292) — it blocks until the turn-done count advances. The recipe (two × send + wait_turn + sleep) needs no step the driver lacks.

## Session model — single-birth, NO presession (verified against the recording)

The failed 1.8 recording's `events.jsonl` starts lifecycle at `transcript_new` for the conv-id session `4acd1802…` followed by state transitions on that SAME conv-id — there is NO `presession_created` / `proc-<PID>` / `pid_discovered` for this cell. Antigravity is transcript-first / single-birth here (session_id = the <conv-id> brain dir from launch), matching the 5.1 sibling and 1.1/1.2/1.4. So the spec anchors `session_birth` to `start` UNPINNED and does NOT use the presession two-phase model. (1.3 long-idle is the only antigravity cell that mints a presession, because it deliberately warms up to bind a live PID — not the case here.)

## Caveat — COST is NOT derivable (deferred to #716)

Antigravity persists NO cost in its store: the only usable usage signal is the in-context occupancy token count (gen_metadata field #5) plus the canonical model id. There are no labeled per-turn input/output/cache token splits and no ground truth to derive a price from (see #716, closed not-planned). So this cell asserts the two store-derived context metrics (`context_window_nonzero` + `context_utilization_nonzero`) but NOT `cost_nonzero`, and NOT `tokens_nonzero` (cum-based, antigravity=0).
caveats: COST is unobservable and intentionally NOT asserted (deferred to #716): antigravity stores only in-context occupancy tokens + the canonical model, with no labeled cost fields or ground truth.

The spec asserts context_window_nonzero + context_utilization_nonzero (the store-derived golden-summary fields surfaced by finalizeSummary, metrics.go:52-59). It does NOT assert tokens_nonzero — that reads cum_input+cum_output (observations.go:37), which antigravity never feeds, so it would hard-fail verify. The occupancy token count is reachable only via total_tokens_nonzero (a separate summary field); the scenario's load-bearing metrics are the two context fields, so those are what's asserted.

model is left PROVISIONAL — not pinned. #719 overwrites the transcript display name with the store's canonical dash-form id (e.g. 'gemini-3.x-flash'); the exact id (and whether the boot default is a flash or pro variant) must be filled by `record` from the live recording, not guessed from docs.

daemon=full is PROVISIONAL on emission: the verdict rests on the store being present beside the transcript at turn_done. #766's capture+serve makes that hold at replay, but a live re-record is what promotes this from provisional to settled (a recording without a captured store reproduces the pre-#719 storeless, tokens-0 state).

sources.note: #719 applyDBMetrics: on turn_done reads the sibling store and sets ev.ModelName (canonical id) + ev.Tokens.Total = contextTokens
readStoreModelTokens + decodeGenMetadata: gen_metadata field #19 = canonical model, field #5 = prompt/context tokens; no cost field present
#766 StageReplayStore (ReplayStoreStager): copies captured store to tmpDir/conversations/<conv>.db and rebuilds brain/<conv>/.system_generated/logs/ so storePathForTranscript resolves at replay
newReplayer relocates the transcript under the staged path so the served store resolves; synthetic-store replay test proves context_window + utilization resolve

finalizeSummary (antigravity-gated on TotalTokens>0) lifts TotalTokens/ContextWindow/ContextUtilization into the golden summary's total_tokens/context_window/context_utilization_percentage (types.go:147-148, omitempty so cum-token goldens stay byte-identical) — the hop that makes the store vector reach of verify

of verify assertions context_window_nonzero / context_utilization_nonzero / total_tokens_nonzero read the store-derived summary fields; the legacy tokens_nonzero reads cum_input+cum_output (observations.go:37) which antigravity never feeds — must NOT be asserted here
wait_turn is in DRIVE_ELICITS and implemented (line 292) — driver=ready, the stale gap:wait_turn was wrong

preconditions: agy CLI on PATH and authenticated (set up out-of-band)

irrlichd is recording with the #766 store-capturing rig (curate-lifecycle-fixture.sh copies store/conversations/<conv>.db) — without the captured store the recording reproduces the pre-#719 tokens-0 state and the spec fails
launch with the DEFAULT model — NO --model flag (this scenario asserts default-launch visibility)
setup: Create an empty cwd under the staging dir
Launch agy interactively with NO --model flag so the boot default model flows through

TWO turns are required: agy's store records contextTokens=0 after the FIRST turn (gen_metadata has only an idx=0 row with 0 — verified by decoding the failed single-turn 1.8 recording's captured store). Context only accrues from the second turn on, so context_window/context_utilization are checked AFTER the second wait_turn.
verify: events.jsonl shows the conv-id session cycle ready->working->ready TWICE (one per turn); no presession proc-row is asserted (the failed 1.8 recording's events.jsonl starts at transcript_new for the conv-id, no presession_created/proc-<PID>)

SessionMetrics.ModelName after the 2nd turn_done is non-empty and != 'unknown' (the store's canonical dash-form id; the failed recording decoded 'gemini-pro-default' — confirm the live id, do not pin)
SessionMetrics.ContextWindow after the 2nd turn_done is > 0 (capacity table for the resolved model)
SessionMetrics.ContextUtilization (context_utilization_percentage) after the 2nd turn_done is > 0 (requires contextTokens>0, which only lands from turn 2)
context_window_nonzero + context_utilization_nonzero hold from the store-derived golden summary; tokens_nonzero is NOT asserted (cum-based, antigravity=0) and cost is NOT asserted (deferred #716)
